cards.finding: Applicable to every enrolled pilot; the installed subject and readiness state must be observed without overwriting target-owned paths.

The starting revision contains the V0 durable schema files scripts/schema/001-init.sql through 004-intervention.sql and documented backup provenance, so absence of the database and archive tool is a failure/blocker rather than grounds to omit the card.
Applicable to every pilot; the selected small task is the target-native architecture invariant.
The owner authorized an isolated interruption and fresh-agent continuation; the selected task validates CA-110 with credential-free local tests.
The owner authorized a deterministic reversible seed and the repository names pnpm test:architecture as the invariant.
The repository exposes target-owned compiler feedback through pnpm typecheck and the owner authorized a reversible seed.
The owner required reusable capability inheritance and a held-out fresh-agent task; dynamic-import boundary enforcement is comparable to the existing static-import invariant.
The owner authorized gardening twice; scope is fixed to one evidence JSON fixture under an identical environment lock.
